description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/sample_tests.py to add a real assertion to test_login_flow, the only test the checker flags as assertion-free. It now asserts the login result is truthy for valid credentials, actually checking the behavior it exercises. check_assertions.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_assertions.py: 1 assertion-free test found — 'test_login_flow' (calls login(...) and prints the result but never asserts anything, so it passes even if login is broken). Adding a real assertion on the actual returned value. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_assertions.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
